'''''Kettemoor''''' was a [[Sacheen-class light escort|''Sacheen''-class light escort]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

During the hunt for the [[Teljkon Vagabond]], ''Kettemoor'' was assigned to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]]'s task force at [[Gmar Askilon]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Kettemoor'' was also the name of a server—or "Galaxy"—in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
